title: 21 Pieces Blister Plasters for Feet - Welnove Invisible Hydrocolloid Gel Blister Bandages - Blister Cushion Pad for Heel Foot Toe and Guard Skin
features: Blister Prevention and Healing - Experience a new standard in blister prevention and healing with our Blister Plasters, boasting an extraordinary 25% more cushioning than comparable products. Our blister plasters provide dependable and lasting foot blister protection.

Sticky & Residue-Free - Our toe blister plasters are highly adhesive, ensuring they stay in place on various body parts such as feet, toes, heels, soles, and fingers. They won't come off when rubbing against shoes, and rest assured, these adhesive plasters leave no sticky residue, making removal painless and hassle-free.

Water-Resistant Bandage - Welnove blister plasters provide exceptional care by effectively blocking water, sweat, and friction. Perfect for sweaty toes, you can confidently use them while swimming and showering. Rest easy, even in the hot summer months, as these bandages stay securely in place, ensuring protection.

Soft & Comfotable Gel Material - Our blister pads for heel boast a soft, ultra-light hydrocolloid gel design. Hydrocolloid plasters are anti-sensitive, waterproof, and adept at absorbing vesicle effusion, shielding against sweat, water, and more. Plus, they're latex-free for added peace of mind.

Full-Day Protection - Get a package of 21pcs blister gel protectors for your feet, featuring 4 distinct shapes and sizes. Customize your protection by using specific shapes on different parts of your body. The individually wrapped packaging enhances portability, allowing you to carry this versatile set wherever you go.
